items.claim: Chase Hooper was a two-to-one favorite in his matchup.
items.quote: Chase Hooper was a two-to-one favorite.

items.claim: Mario Bautista entered his fight as an underdog.
items.quote: Mario Bautista, yeah, that was a dog.

items.claim: Fans overrated Cory Sandhagen due to fandom, overlooking Mario Bautista.
items.quote: people just love Cory Sandhagen so much they couldn't see past it.
